# GYEON PPF Maintain 500ml

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__09_Leaflet_PPF_Maintenace_2022_WEB.pdf?v=1666391020)

**SLICK AND REPELLENT FINISH: **Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined will allow you to maintain the incredible slickness of your PPF or Vinyl wrap. Being SiO² based, it will also increase the original hydrophobicity of your film while adding more protection against UV rays & future oxidation.

**REDEFINED: **We are introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we’ve taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. We’ve reworked and refined them to deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. We’re committed to giving our customers the best user experience possible.

**BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN:** Use Q²M PPF Maintain Redefined for maintenance purposes on any Paint Protection Film, glossy or matte, coated with Q² PPF EVO or not.TIP: You may use the product both on wet and dry paint - it will enhance the finish, prolong the durability of the coating and help with drying and removing streaks.Q²M PPF Maintain can be used on vinyl wrap as well.
